textByHash.e5d86a6cf585130a6dab57cc10f82edf7d5b56b1: Greetings, human... can I interest you in some fine gems?
textByHash.4ec029bf985e82d80459e37697a769d45ff80807: Hello! I've got a little quest for you, are you interested?
textByHash.18c514663a7d76578f1fd42acceac7b2799c4aa8: That's the spirit! Now, what I need is item. And I need them within minutes as well.
textByHash.c67e5567f4171c5bf34dd5e3c14fae1589c42b4e: Don't be so dismissive, you didn't even hear what I wanted to ask you!
textByHash.5693a8d81bb5f2876eeab72a88f2b18c5d79d31a: Are my item arriving anytime soon?
textByHash.da8c394254db34f974cbaecf82d192cb9490b678: Couldn't you decide that in advance? You're certainly lacking in manners!
textByHash.c2cef1545f5b622baa18edff6dbb83e0ff62c859: Good, soon can't be soon enough for me!
textByHash.67912404aa649a107dc8a92a72b257c76a708dd9: Time's up! And I don't have my item!
textByHash.7724a070fc85c613d97e1e404f8950847fe7fffc: And not a minute too late! Great!
textByHash.6b91ead5f0f435645744e7da7c38465954c6bd4c: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?
textByHash.f91c9fdf173e3389a2616ff163cd9707ec5cfa82: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?
